sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6700" key="a)nakh/ruktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακήρ-υκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀκήρυκτος</ref></xr>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.139</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
